_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: Tom Bergin's
venues.note: Historic Fairfax Irish pub; long-standing soccer-watching crowd for internationals.

venues.name: The Greyhound Bar & Grill
venues.note: Highland Park bar that opens for big matches; neighborhood soccer following.

venues.name: The Parlor Hollywood
venues.note: Hosts large national-team and tournament watch parties; UNVERIFIED affiliation, confirm before launch.
